description: No public availability calendar on profile.
expectedBehavior: Do not show provider free time slots; only request CTA is shown.
Seeker creates conversation request before any time coordination.
Provider must propose 3 to 6 date/time options.
Seeker may select exactly one proposed option or cancel.

description: Profile must be active to appear in discover.
expectedBehavior: Profile is hidden from discover and public request flow.
Do not show settings as top-level header nav; expose through profile page.

description: My Profile request notifications are small notifications only.
expectedBehavior: Show notification/link to conversations; do not render full request cards in profile dashboard.

description: Follow, save and followers are managed in Network page.
expectedBehavior: Show tabs for following, saved and followers with search/filter/sort.

description: Feedback received is accessible to profile owner.
expectedBehavior: Show feedback summary and list for completed conversations.

description: Business manager is highest org level.
expectedBehavior: Order: کارآموز، کارشناس، کارشناس ارشد، مدیر میانی، مدیر ارشد، معاونت، مدیر کسب و کار.
